description: Update state files and run final validation. Update .agents/state/quant-autonomous-status.json to reflect phase-14 and phase-15 completion. Update .agents/state/quant-phase-log.md with evidence of gate passage. Ensure all quality gates pass.
steps: 1. Run pnpm install --frozen-lockfile and verify pass.
2. Run pnpm typecheck and verify all tasks pass.
3. Run pnpm build and verify all tasks pass.
4. Run pnpm test and verify all tasks pass.
5. Run pnpm lint and verify all tasks pass.
6. Run pnpm audit --audit-level=high and verify 0 high vulnerabilities.

7. Update .agents/state/quant-autonomous-status.json: set current_phase to phase-15-complete, add phase-14 and phase-15 to completed_phases array, update last_updated timestamp, confirm all gates pass.
8. Append to .agents/state/quant-phase-log.md with Phase 14 and Phase 15 completion entries including gate evidence.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 quality gates pass (install, typecheck, build, test, lint, audit)
.agents/state/quant-autonomous-status.json shows phase-15-complete with phase-14 and phase-15 in completed_phases
.agents/state/quant-phase-log.md has new entries for both phases
findings: All 6 quality gates passed: install (lockfile up to date), typecheck (73/73), build (52/52), test (76/76), lint (62/62), audit (0 high - 7 moderate + 1 low only). State files updated with phase-14 and phase-15 completion.
